title: My Key
subtitle: Details for <name>{{name}}</name>. All logs, traces, and dashboard data in this session are scoped to this key.

trace.title: Trace capture
trace.description: Capture full request/response payloads for this key only.
trace.globalOn: Global tracing is ON (admin) — all requests are captured regardless of this toggle.
trace.on: Currently capturing traces for this key.
trace.off: Tracing is off for this key.

rotate.title: Rotate secret
rotate.description: Generates a new secret for this key. The old secret stops working immediately. Your historical logs, traces, and errors are preserved (they're indexed by key name, not secret).
rotate.confirmBody: The old secret will stop working immediately. Any clients using it will receive 401 errors until they are updated with the new secret.
rotate.successBody: Copy this secret now — it will not be shown again.
rotate.sessionRefreshFailed: Secret rotated, but session refresh failed. Re-login with the new secret.
